title: I recently edited a specific field without realizing there were multiple items selected on my board. Now every item in has the same data in that column
excerpt: I recently edited a specific field without realizing there were multiple items selected on my board. Now every item in has the same data in that column.

posts.author: Divo (Divo)
posts.cookedHtml: I recently edited a specific field without realizing there were multiple items selected on my board. Now every item in has the same data in that column.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Divo! So sorry that happened to you! For this type of situation, you can use your activity log to retrace your steps but you won’t be able to undo all of it in one action.

If you have any questions about this, shoot us a message at support@monday.com!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
